detail: Neither tested client exposes physical VARTYPE on ordinary property-get results. The raw windows-sys kernel remains required whenever a physical return tag is material.
The public comtypes automatic conversion documents None as Null. This differential does not claim a public nested-container construction for an explicit VT_EMPTY element beyond the raw SDK control.
The observations apply to the installed Excel Automation server and recorded Python environments only; they do not generalize to other Office builds, locales, or bitness combinations.
